title: Codiscovering graphical structure and functional relationships within data: A Gaussian Process framework for connecting the dots

methodology.approach: Kernel generalization of Row Echelon Form reduction and variance-based analysis
methodology.key_technique: Variables linked via GPs, with highest data variance variables revealing hypergraph structure

applications: Network discovery (gene pathways, chemical, and mechanical)

Type_1.name: Regression
Type_1.description: Approximate an unknown function given (possibly noisy) input/output data

Type_2.name: Hypergraph Completion
Type_2.description: Approximate all unobserved variables and unknown functions in a hypergraph with known structure

Type_3.name: Hypergraph Discovery
Type_3.description: Discover the hypergraph structure itself and then approximate its unknown functions and unobserved variables

key_contributions: Framework for Type 3 problems that doesn't require assumptions of randomized data or access to data generation process
Approach that encodes different information into structure compared to causal inference methods
